name: QuickCharge Express
description: A high-traffic conversion of a classic interstate fuel station. 500 kVA utility connection supports 1x350kW + 1x50kW DCFC. Features a centered convenience store, a large illuminated canopy, and optimized charging bays near the service area.
visual_description: Converted gas station. Large red canopy covering the center charging area (cols 4-11, rows 2-5). Convenience store building (blue accents) in the middle rows. Disabled gas pump islands on the left side. Gas station sign near entry. Dumpster area bottom-left. Street trees top corners. Road along top and bottom rows.
